series_metadata.series_description: National Pollutant Discharge Elimination System Permits File--Permits, applications and associated actions, effective for a maximum of five years, regulating discharges of pollutants into waters of the state in accordance with Federal and State rules

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain in operating area until permit expires, then retain in off-site storage for 10 years, then destroy., Paper: Wastepaper
